calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Damien P. Lillis, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ANN LA MORENA ROHLIN ("Plaintiff")
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VIRGINIA N. BUBAN ("Defendant").
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing,
The court hereby enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and againstDefendant on all claims and counts including Plaitiff's cause of action for breach of contract and common counts. Specifically, the Court finds and concludes that Defendant breached the Promissory Note requiring payment to Teresita Santamaria (who thereafter assigned her claim to Plaintiff)
Accordingly, the Court awards Plaintiff the following:
Principal amount: $35,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,650.04
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $2,118.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $54,843.16.
The Court further awards Plaintiff post-judgment interes in the amount of $9.58 per day from the date this Judgment is entered until satisfied.
The Court finds that Plaintiff is the prevailing party in this action on all of its cause of action.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
